items.titolo: WIRED Roundup: Gemini 3 Release, Nvidia Earnings, Epstein Files Fallout
items.descrizione: In this episode of Uncanny Valley, we cover the news of the week and take a closer look at the Gemini 3, Google’s latest AI model and chatbot.
